prompt:
[Character] Image 1 [Signature] In the lower right corner, a small Threads by Meta logo is placed, and above it, "CHAse" is written in small white cursive like a signature.

[Character Pose and Expression]
A bust-shot pose gazing straight ahead in a dark and dreamlike indoor space. With the right eye area completely covered by a white feather decoration, she quietly looks at the camera with a single clear and calm left eye. She wears a calm yet somehow lingering and mysterious expression, creating a lonely and spiritual atmosphere as if there were a hidden story.

[Character Costume]
Wearing a minimal and pure cream white V-neck sleeveless dress with a deep chest line. The black color of the innerwear is slightly overlapped at the center of the neckline to provide a subtle color contrast, overall giving the feeling of a pure yet avant-garde concept pictorial.

[Character Hairstyle and Makeup Details]
Romantic wavy hairstyle with long dark brown tones flowing smoothly below the shoulders, and a subtle gold gradient at the ends of the hair under warm lighting. Several white bird feathers were elaborately attached along the right eye and cheekbone line of the character to create a mysterious masked effect. Thin silver cross earrings are worn in the right ear, and a slim chain necklace with a small square pendant is matched around the neck. The makeup naturally emphasizes the shadows of the features and finishes cleanly with a calm-toned lip.

[Lighting and Light Direction]
Surreal golden backlighting (rim light) bursting intensely from right behind the headpiece. The dazzling light emitting from the back blurs the outline of the top of the head, creating a strong halo effect and brilliantly lighting up the feathers of the headpiece as if they were burning. This casts deep shadows on the front of the character while forming a subtle green semi-circular lens flare across the center of the screen in front of the chest, completing the dreamy foreground detail.

[Texture and Color Mood]
Dominated by warm and heavy amber and sepia gold tones. The texture of the intensely glowing pure white feathers, the dazzling backlighting shining on every strand of hair, and the fine, coarse grain characteristic of analog film warmly enveloping the entire screen combine to create an atmosphere like a cinematic dark fairy tale.

[Film and Camera Lens Depth, Angle]
Captured using a 50mm standard prime lens with an aperture of f/1.8, shutter speed of 1/160 sec, and ISO 400. A composition captured tightly at eye-level to fully focus attention on the character's mysterious features and strange gaze. A shallow depth of field was applied to clearly focus on the front of the character's face and necklace line, while the bursts of light and dark background behind melt away softly in out-of-focus processing.

[Background Elements (Optional)]
A dark, minimal studio background with light and fine smoke subtly mixed. A giant headpiece in the shape of angel wings connected by chains and a metal frame worn on the head majestically fills the top of the background, and strong light emanates from the decoration itself, providing a sense of depth and space.
